steps.title: Use the access contrast
steps.content: The sentence says the mission data were mostly inaccessible until a recent transfer project changed that. The blank needs the opposite of inaccessible: something usable or obtainable.

steps.title: Reject unrelated results
steps.content: Choice A would mean difficult, not newly usable. Choice B means typical of a group. Choice D means able to be predicted. The transfer project made the data accessible for Ellis's research. The answer is C.
